v2026-05-08 23:38:20

2026-05-08 23:38:20

auto

@lhl

Created by smart-doc

1.商品管理

1.1.查询商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

status

int16

审核状态

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

brandId

string

店铺ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=js5hsd&order=hw36ku&name=kallie.hodkiewicz&status=1787&goodsId=7&brandId=7&goodsSn=2rnhha

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "sota0w",
  "errmsg": "lpw9r5",
  "data": {}
}

1.2.获取店铺与分类选择列表

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 获取店铺与分类选择列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "nzdfl0",
  "errmsg": "lpmqvm",
  "data": {}
}

1.3.编辑商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

└─goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

└─name

string

商品名称

false

-

└─categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

└─brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

└─gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

└─brief

string

商品简介

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

└─shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

└─address

string

自提地址

false

-

└─isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

└─isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

└─isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

└─isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

└─unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

└─counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

└─retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

└─detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

└─remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

└─status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

└─weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

products

array

货品信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品货品表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specifications

array

商品规格值列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─price

number

商品货品价格

false

-

└─number

int32

商品货品数量

false

-

└─url

string

商品货品图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

grouponRules

object

团购规则

false

-

└─id

string

团购规则表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

└─discount

number

优惠金额

false

-

└─discountMember

int32

团购人数

false

-

└─expireTime

string

团购过期时间

false

-

└─status

int16

团购规则状态，正常上线则0，到期自动下线则1，管理手动下线则2

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

attributes

array

商品参数

false

-

└─id

string

商品参数表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─attribute

string

商品参数名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品参数值

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

specifications

array

商品规格

false

-

└─id

string

商品规格表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specification

string

商品规格名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品规格值

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品规格图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/update --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "7",
    "goodsSn": "93fm7s",
    "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
    "categoryId": "7",
    "brandId": "7",
    "gallery": [
      "kdtlnp"
    ],
    "keywords": "dlx45s",
    "brief": "4o33ol",
    "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
    "shareUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
    "address": "Apt. 959 1699 Felix Street， Perryfurt， KS 81410",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "w4wa20",
    "counterPrice": 68,
    "retailPrice": 458,
    "detail": "jglzz7",
    "remarks": "egayrc",
    "status": 18312,
    "weight": 741,
    "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "7",
    "version": 327
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "7",
      "goodsId": "7",
      "specifications": [
        "upggod"
      ],
      "price": 214,
      "number": 711,
      "url": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "7",
      "version": 538
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "7",
    "goodsId": "7",
    "goodsName": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
    "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
    "discount": 971,
    "discountMember": 318,
    "expireTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "status": 21863,
    "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "7",
    "version": 828
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "7",
      "goodsId": "7",
      "attribute": "s8rb6d",
      "value": "f8nbz9",
      "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "7",
      "version": 907
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "7",
      "goodsId": "7",
      "specification": "gg5bio",
      "value": "etn2bl",
      "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "7",
      "version": 625
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "q7z46y",
  "errmsg": "27yisq",
  "data": {}
}

1.4.删除商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/delete --data 'id=7'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "rlt32u",
  "errmsg": "w55he2",
  "data": {}
}

1.5.批量删除商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/batch-delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 批量删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ids

array

id列表

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/batch-delete --data '{
  "ids": [
    "yj1hg8"
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "52suo2",
  "errmsg": "zbpjjx",
  "data": {}
}

1.6.商品上下架

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/on-sale

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 商品上下架

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

brief

string

商品简介

false

-

picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/on-sale --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "goodsSn": "xdydq4",
  "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "categoryId": "7",
  "brandId": "7",
  "gallery": [
    "wxdij0"
  ],
  "keywords": "qfb35m",
  "brief": "55bd58",
  "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "shareUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "address": "Apt. 959 1699 Felix Street， Perryfurt， KS 81410",
  "isGroupon": true,
  "isNew": true,
  "isHot": true,
  "isTakeTheir": true,
  "unit": "lvqifd",
  "counterPrice": 508,
  "retailPrice": 911,
  "detail": "21jr4j",
  "remarks": "6s5fa6",
  "status": 16969,
  "weight": 865,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 931
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "7fcwv8",
  "errmsg": "x5h4jm",
  "data": {}
}

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/create --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "7",
    "goodsSn": "aotrkf",
    "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
    "categoryId": "7",
    "brandId": "7",
    "gallery": [
      "7ygwnk"
    ],
    "keywords": "nkje7g",
    "brief": "bgerhw",
    "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
    "shareUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
    "address": "Apt. 959 1699 Felix Street， Perryfurt， KS 81410",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "mwx6ig",
    "counterPrice": 389,
    "retailPrice": 735,
    "detail": "7ux55f",
    "remarks": "qs9xp3",
    "status": 31791,
    "weight": 841,
    "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "7",
    "version": 366
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "7",
      "goodsId": "7",
      "specifications": [
        "01nkze"
      ],
      "price": 603,
      "number": 124,
      "url": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "7",
      "version": 892
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "7",
    "goodsId": "7",
    "goodsName": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
    "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
    "discount": 587,
    "discountMember": 38,
    "expireTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "status": 25493,
    "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "7",
    "version": 958
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "7",
      "goodsId": "7",
      "attribute": "ewm2zv",
      "value": "19xceg",
      "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "7",
      "version": 76
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "7",
      "goodsId": "7",
      "specification": "egn7t7",
      "value": "07ks2n",
      "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "7",
      "version": 877
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ekarbq",
  "errmsg": "08x7yk",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

Description: 商品详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

object

2.团购管理

2.1.查询参与用户

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

status

int16

团购状态

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

ruleId

string

团购规则ID

false

-

grouponId

string

团购ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/join?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=ix9ww0&order=jufjwh&status=25563&userId=7&ruleId=7&grouponId=7

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "vyqr0e",
  "errmsg": "878aus",
  "data": {}
}

3.1.查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/feedback/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/feedback/list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=3x2j3z&order=hz2ank&userId=7&username=kallie.hodkiewicz&mobile=618-724-2029

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

  "data": {}

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Description: 查询

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

int32

false

-

limit

int32

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

id

string

false

-

name

string

false

4.3.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/create --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "depict": "ys11n3",
  "mail": "gk2x6z",
  "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "floorPrice": 115,
  "address": "Apt. 959 1699 Felix Street， Perryfurt， KS 81410",
  "version": 506
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "71toqx",
  "errmsg": "nuoiat",
  "data": {}
}

4.4.编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/update --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "userId": "7",
  "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "depict": "n0o0ii",
  "mail": "y8vupl",
  "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "address": "Apt. 959 1699 Felix Street， Perryfurt， KS 81410",
  "floorPrice": 494,
  "lookCount": 681,
  "likeCount": 1,
  "commentCount": 800,
  "status": 35,
  "weight": 328,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 62
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "4myu8s",
  "errmsg": "ohzfox",
  "data": {}
}

8.1.分享记录查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/share/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 分享记录查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

inviterId

string

分享人

false

-

status

int16

分享状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/share/list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=ep074w&order=u0rpvk&userId=7&inviterId=7&status=18475

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "m34jl7",
  "errmsg": "ni9ibn",
  "data": {}
}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

序号ID

false

-

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

int32

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

false

url

string

false

-

keyword

string

false

9.3.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/keyword/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

关键字表ID

false

-

keyword

string

关键字

false

-

url

string

关键字的跳转链接

false

-

isHot

boolean

是否是热门关键字

false

-

isDefault

boolean

是否是默认关键字

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/keyword/create --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "keyword": "34y580",
  "url": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "isHot": true,
  "isDefault": true,
  "weight": 661,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 575
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

any object.

false

false

13.2.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/ad/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

广告表ID

false

-

name

string

广告标题

false

-

link

string

所广告的商品页面或者活动页面链接地址

false

-

url

string

广告宣传图片

false

-

position

int8

广告位置：1则是首页

false

-

content

string

活动内容

false

-

startTime

string

广告开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

广告结束时间

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启动

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/ad/create --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "link": "e2uv3s",
  "url": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "position": 113,
  "content": "kmdd9b",
  "startTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "endTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "enabled": true,
  "weight": 233,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 311
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "y9nsxj",
  "errmsg": "3bj0ci",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

mail

string

邮箱

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

username

string

账号名称

false

-

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/admin/list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=etdztt&order=fw1e2a&mail=lhrt28&mobile=618-724-2029&username=kallie.hodkiewicz

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

  "url": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",

  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",

16.6.百度富文本编辑器文件上传

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/storage/uploadFile

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

Description: 百度富文本编辑器文件上传

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

upfile

file

文件

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -F 'upfile=' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/storage/uploadFile

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "gvn6pj",
  "errmsg": "iwwmhm",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

taskId

string

赏金规则ID

false

-

rewardId

string

赏金参与ID

false

-

status

int16

赏金状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/join?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=sns9qr&order=f5rhvy&userId=7&taskId=7&rewardId=7&status=16341

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

}

18.4.编辑赏金规则

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑赏金规则

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

赏金任务规则表ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

goodsPrice

number

商品价格

false

-

picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

award

number

奖励金额

false

-

joinersMember

int32

参与者数量

false

-

rewardMember

int32

活动数量

false

-

status

int16

赏金任务状态，0正常，1已完成，2已取消

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/update --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "goodsId": "7",
  "goodsName": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "goodsPrice": 382,
  "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "award": 633,
  "joinersMember": 563,
  "rewardMember": 54,
  "status": 13172,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 163
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "4sj3lm",
  "errmsg": "6lt0gl",
  "data": {}
}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

序号ID

-

page

int32

false

-

limit

int32

false

-

sort

string

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

mobile

string

手机号

false

orderSn

string

订单编号

false

-

brandId

string

false

-

string

商品ID

false

-

showType

int32

查询类型

false

-

shipSn

string

false

-

start

string

开始日期

false

-

end

string

截至日期

false

-

orderStatusArray

array

订单状态列表

false

-

20.9.删除订单

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/order/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Request-headers:

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/dynamic/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 修改日常

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

动态表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

content

string

发表内容

false

-

picUrls

array

图片地址列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

isAdmin

boolean

是否管理员，0不是，1是

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/dynamic/update --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "userId": "7",
  "content": "vw59qi",
  "picUrls": [
    "ad86c2"
  ],
  "likeCount": 69,
  "lookCount": 460,
  "commentCount": 669,
  "isAdmin": true,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 14
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

ids

array

id列表

true

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/notice/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

通知表ID

-

title

string

通知标题

false

-

content

string

通知内容

false

-

adminId

string

创建通知的管理员ID，如果是系统内置通知则是0.

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

  "title": "kcgija",
  "content": "dqzqmh",
  "adminId": "7",
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 210
}'

data

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

int32

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/read?id=7

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

Response-example:

29.4.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/create --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "depict": "c3x8zp",
  "tag": "oexnry",
  "total": 848,
  "discount": 53,
  "min": 338,
  "limit": 24860,
  "type": 1393,
  "status": 8175,
  "goodsType": 18218,
  "goodsIds": [
    "6u7yja"
  ],
  "code": "24428",
  "timeType": 3082,
  "days": 20184,
  "startTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "endTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 155
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "lpigch",
  "errmsg": "b3t0km",
  "data": {}
}

29.5.编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/update --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "name": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "depict": "xeryqu",
  "tag": "d1146c",
  "total": 455,
  "discount": 472,
  "min": 153,
  "limit": 1400,
  "type": 19533,
  "status": 3959,
  "goodsType": 25687,
  "goodsIds": [
    "u281fs"
  ],
  "code": "24428",
  "timeType": 26159,
  "days": 14045,
  "startTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "endTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:21",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 942
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "5lpmgy",
  "errmsg": "e97g3c",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

序号ID

false

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

question

string

问题标题

false

-

32.3.查询角色详情

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/role/read

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询角色详情

33.专题管理

33.1.专题列表

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 专题列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

title

string

标题

false

-

subtitle

string

子标题

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=dfyca4&order=lbt3d0&title=pdmf9m&subtitle=nm983c

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "h4nopj",
  "errmsg": "8318vx",
  "data": {}
}

33.2.专题添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 专题添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

专题表ID

false

-

title

string

专题标题

false

-

subtitle

string

专题子标题

false

-

author

string

专题作者

false

-

content

string

专题内容，富文本格式

false

-

price

number

专题相关商品最低价

false

-

readCount

string

专题阅读量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

picUrl

string

专题图片

false

-

goodsIds

array

专题相关商品，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/create --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "title": "xt80gq",
  "subtitle": "07206k",
  "author": "Hassie Bernier V",
  "content": "kzb3w3",
  "price": 797,
  "readCount": "02lf7j",
  "likeCount": 282,
  "commentCount": 958,
  "picUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "goodsIds": [
    "k09h3c"
  ],
  "weight": 413,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 299
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

35.用户管理

35.1.用户查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

mobile

string

联系电话

false

-

inviter

string

用户邀请者

false

-

level

int8

用户等级

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=fu1e9n&order=j9h4k1&userId=7&username=kallie.hodkiewicz&mobile=618-724-2029&inviter=vv9hdu&level=56

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "7wfpo1",
  "errmsg": "rrlftq",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/detail

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/detail?id=7

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "zieysb",
  "errmsg": "wvsa04",
  "data": {}
}

35.3.用户编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 用户编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户表ID

false

-

inviter

string

邀请者

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

password

string

用户密码

false

-

trueName

string

真实姓名

false

-

gender

int8

性别：0 未知， 1男， 2女

false

-

birthday

string

生日

false

-

shareUrl

string

个人分享图片

false

-

lastLoginTime

string

最近一次登录时间

false

-

lastLoginIp

string

最近一次登录IP地址

false

-

userLevel

int8

0 普通用户，1 VIP用户，2 高级VIP用户

false

-

integral

number

用户积分

false

-

nickName

string

用户昵称或网络名称

false

-

mobile

string

用户手机号码

false

-

avatarUrl

string

用户头像图片

false

-

openid

string

微信登录openid

false

-

sessionKey

string

微信登录会话KEY

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/update --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "inviter": "kbvy90",
  "username": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "password": "5ohptg",
  "trueName": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "gender": 34,
  "birthday": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "shareUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "lastLoginTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "lastLoginIp": "97.162.219.213",
  "userLevel": 27,
  "integral": 204,
  "nickName": "milton.wolf",
  "mobile": "618-724-2029",
  "avatarUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "openid": "7",
  "sessionKey": "skzzmy",
  "status": 43,
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 217
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "j2u0pp",
  "errmsg": "ko5ttq",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/delete --data 'id=7'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{

  "errmsg": "k5qiln",
  "data": {}
}

35.5.批量注销用户

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/batch-delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 批量注销用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ids

array

id列表

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/batch-delete --data '{
  "ids": [
    "g2043o"
  ]
}'

35.7.用户交易记录

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/deal-list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户交易记录

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

dealType

int16

交易类型

false

-

status

boolean

交易状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/deal-list?id=7&page=1&limit=10&sort=u7mhf5&order=nu6ryn&userId=7&dealType=12984&status=true

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

any object.

  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/tenant/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加租户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

租户表ID

false

-

address

string

租户地址

false

-

appId

string

小程序appId

false

-

appSecret

string

小程序密钥

false

-

aesKey

string

消息推送key

false

-

token

string

消息推送token

false

-

mchId

string

微信商户号

false

-

mchKey

string

微信商户密钥

false

-

keyPath

string

微信支付证书地址

false

-

apiV3Key

string

微信支付v3密钥

false

-

privateCertPath

string

微信支付证书地址.cert

false

-

privateKeyPath

string

微信支付证书地址.key

false

-

jdbcUrl

string

数据库链接地址

false

-

username

string

数据库用户名

false

-

password

string

数据库密码

false

-

driverClassName

string

数据库驱动

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/tenant/create --data '{
  "id": "7",
  "address": "Apt. 959 1699 Felix Street， Perryfurt， KS 81410",
  "appId": "7",
  "appSecret": "mqtaqr",
  "aesKey": "bizprb",
  "token": "oewoow",
  "mchId": "7",
  "mchKey": "n21dmd",
  "keyPath": "wr6dl6",
  "apiV3Key": "fo8e89",
  "privateCertPath": "2uyd2v",
  "privateKeyPath": "1tvdqf",
  "jdbcUrl": "www.deandre-hoeger.io",
  "username": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "password": "2opcqz",
  "driverClassName": "kallie.hodkiewicz",
  "addTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-08 23:38:22",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "7",
  "version": 26
}'

errno

string

-
